test_output_summary: 90 passed in 1.88s (tests/knowledge/test_config.py, tests/knowledge/test_graphiti_lazy_init.py, tests/cli/test_graphiti.py); 1336 passed in full graphiti suite
implementation_notes: Made surgical edits to three files as specified. config.py was already fully implemented (fields, validation, defaults, env overrides, docstring all in place). Changes made: (1) graphiti_client.py: Added VALID_PROVIDERS constant before GraphitiConfig class, added 6 new fields (llm_provider, llm_base_url, llm_model, embedding_provider, embedding_base_url, embedding_model) after the deprecated 'port' field, added provider validation and base_url-requirement validation in __post_init__, updated docstring with new attributes and raises, updated _try_lazy_init() to pass new fields. (2) graphiti.py: Updated _get_client_and_config() to pass all 6 new fields when constructing GraphitiConfig. A notable implementation detail: in _try_lazy_init(), used _str_attr()/_opt_str_attr() helper functions with isinstance checks instead of direct attribute access. This was necessary because existing tests use MagicMock for settings, and MagicMock auto-creates attributes that are themselves MagicMock objects (not strings), which would fail GraphitiConfig validation. The helper functions gracefully fall back to defaults when the attribute is not a proper string, preserving backward compatibility with existing tests without modifying test files.
